# Plant Disease Detection

## Model
MobileNetV2

## Dataset
PlantVillage

## Classes
38

## Framework
TensorFlow 2.x

## Image Size
224×224

## Batch Size
32

## Epochs
10

## Outputs

- Disease Name
- Confidence
- Prediction Time

## Generated Files

- best_disease_model.keras
- class_names.json
- final_metrics.csv
- classification_report.csv
- final_confusion_matrix.png
